channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced will ‘bring the classic game back to life’ — here are 7 new things I’m looking forward to
item.description: As an Assassin’s Creed expert, here are 7 things I’m looking forward to in Black Flag Resynced.
